items.name: ChromeCRISPR
items.description: Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for CRISPR/Cas9 On-Target Activity Prediction

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics
items.description: This project is a Digital Twin–based predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: Multitask-Machine-Learning-for-News-Classification-and-Sentiment-Analysis
items.description: Based on DistilBERT, a multi-task learning framework was constructed, integrating Dropout and residual connections. Through grid search and early stopping methods, the hyperparameters were optimized to achieve joint modeling of six categories of news and sentiment classification.

items.name: California-Earthquake-Forecasting-and-Analysis
items.description: A physics-informed machine learning framework for earthquake forecasting in California (1995-2025). This project integrates statistical seismology (Gutenberg-Richter law, Omori's Law) with XGBoost to identify predictive precursors to major seismic events.

items.name: tyr
items.description: A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

items.name: Autonomous-Trading-Signal-Engine-Quantitative-Trend-Prediction-Framework
items.description: This project integrates historical stock data, technical indicators, sentiment analysis, and machine learning (XGBoost, Random Forest) to predict trends and generate Buy/Sell/Hold signals.

items.name: data-prep-practices-length-of-stay-analysis
items.description: This repository contains the full analysis, methodology, and results for a machine learning study focused on predicting Length of Stay in hospital admissions using **Electronic Health Record (EHR)** data.   The project explores how different preprocessing strategies and model frameworks impact predictive performance and feature interpretability.

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: AIX
items.description: A lean Torch like C++ machine learning framework with multiple device acceleration support.

items.name: senegal-yield-climate-extremes
items.description: Machine learning framework (Random Forest and LASSO) to assess the impact of climate extremes on crop yield anomalies in Senegal using CMIP6 projections and SHAP analysis.

items.name: bone-fracture-detection-using-quantum-machine-learning
items.description: Quantum Transfer Learning (QTL) framework for radiographic fracture detection. Benchmarking ResNet, VGG, and DenseNet with Variational Quantum Circuits (VQC).

items.name: ML-EdgeArchitecture
items.description: framework IoT implementazione di una pipeline completa per il training, la distribuzione e l'inferenza di modelli di Machine Learning

items.name: Project
items.description: SecureShield: A machine Learning framework for Credit Card Fraud Detection

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: About-me
items.description: I am MSc Data Science student dedicated to bridging the gap between statistical theory and computational application. With a foundational background in Statistics. I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insight. Technical Toolkit: Python | R | Machine Learning | Statistical Analysis | MEL Frameworks | Program Management

items.name: ml-training-framework
items.description: A comprehensive, extensible machine learning framework supporting neural networks with PyTorch/TensorFlow backends.

items.name: Physics-Informed-Explainable-Machine-Learning-for-Hardness-Prediction-in-High-Entropy-Alloys
items.description: Physics-informed and explainable machine learning framework for predicting hardness in high-entropy alloys. Integrates descriptor-based modeling, SHAP interpretability, statistical validation, and finite element simulations to ensure physically consistent and reproducible results.

items.name: A-Data-Driven-Framework-For-Optimized-Inverstment-Decision-Making

items.description: This project uses ensemble machine learning, specifically LightGBM and CatBoost, to detect privilege escalation attacks in cloud environments. By analyzing user behavior and logs, it identifies malicious insider threats and anomalous activities with high accuracy, providing a robust framework to prevent unauthorized data access.

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: bare-metal-ml

All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: british-airways-data-science

Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

It includes end-to-end pipelines, feature engineering experiments, and predictive modeling using various machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Ecommerce-AI-Communication-Framework
items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.

items.name: masters-thesis-AI-reliability-assessment-framework
items.description: The development and evaluation of the RAF, a reliability and trustworthiness assessment framework for any AI project. Tested through a practical use case, involving machine learning-driven prediction of heartbeats in radar signals.

items.name: Streamlit
items.description: Streamlit Complete Reference Notes Streamlit is an open-source Python framework for building interactive web apps for data science and machine learning — with no front-end experience required. You write pure Python, and Streamlit renders the UI in a browser. Every time a user interacts with a widget, the script reruns from top to bottom.

items.name: Ensemble-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Detection-and-Classification-of-Obfuscated-Malware-
items.description: Developed an ensemble machine learning framework for detecting and classifying obfuscated malware using the CIC-MalMem-2022 dataset. Applied feature selection, data balancing, and models like RF, XGBoost, and MLP, achieving robust detection across binary and multiclass tasks.

Conçu autour de classes abstraites (ABC), de décorateurs de tracking d'état et d'une architecture extensible pensée pour le travail
